examples: Yes, but I think I can mange.
The animal has been tentatively identified as a fox with mange.
Some of Mrs Clinton's confidants are also worried that their attack-dog has a touch of the mange.
The three-year-old, called Maggie, was found underweight, with lice, mange and signs of serious neglect.
The tiger waited for them to fall, then scavenged them until he got mange, lost two teeth, and moved on.
